build_system: CMake with ENABLE_QT option. Linux builds with ENABLE_QT=OFF (no Qt available), Windows CI builds with ENABLE_QT=ON + Qt 6.8.1
verification_instructions: 1. Run cmake build with ENABLE_QT=OFF. 2. Run all 1618 tests. 3. Verify QML files have valid syntax (no broken imports or references).
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external packages. Qt is NOT available on the sandbox. QML changes are validated syntactically only. C++ build must stay green with ENABLE_QT=OFF.
contribution_requirements: Must not break non-Qt Linux build. Must not change C++ technology stack. Must work with Qt 6.8.1. All 1618 tests must pass.
key_patterns: QML pages import '../../themes' and '../../widgets'. ThemeManager is a pragma Singleton. Pages use local QtObject for ViewModel placeholder data. StackView navigation uses page path strings relative to qml/. Widgets registered in qml/widgets/qmldir. New QML files must be added to src/app/qml.qrc with alias paths.
directory_structure: qml/ - all QML UI files. qml/pages/<module>/<Module>Page.qml - page components. qml/widgets/ - reusable widgets with qmldir. qml/themes/ - ThemeManager singleton + theme definitions. qml/components/ - NavigationSidebar, TopBar, StatusBar. src/app/qml.qrc - Qt resource file mapping all QML. src/app/include/app/viewmodels/ - C++ ViewModel headers. tests/ - C++ unit tests.
